name: vtsSetOutputMask
title: vtsSetOutputMask
description: Activates the requested rows of a switch matrix module for dynamic stimulation (PWM, Bitstreams). The row selection is binary encoded into the call parameter.

parameters.name: RowMask
parameters.description: Binary interpreted 32bit unsigned integer value where the least significant five bits encode the connection of the corresponding matrix row with the current matrix channel.

description: The following example demonstrates how an identical switch sequence defined in MyBitstream.txt (e.g. a bouncing contact simulation) is applied subsequently to all rows of a VT2832 channel.
